title: Over Door Hanger, 6 Hooks Over The Door Hooks, Bearing Weight 20kg Over Door Hook Rack for Hanging Coat, Towel, Bag, Clothes, Over The Door Hanger Suitable for Bathroom, Bedroom, Kitchen

features: Durability: Our door hook is made of high-quality aerospace aluminium and coated with a waterproof and rust-resistant environmentally friendly layer. It ensures long durability and reliability.

PERFECT SIZE Designed with precise measurements of 15.6 x 4.3 x 1.77 inches, our over door hook easily fits all standard doors. It is recommended for door thickness 4.5 cm. The maximum load capacity is 20.0 kg.

Strong load capacity: our door hook can securely hold various items such as coats, towels, bathrobes, bags and clothes. Even if multiple items are hung, it remains stable without it loosening or falling off.
Easy to install: The design of our door hook is simple, making the installation process quick and effortless. Save time and effort and enjoy a tidy home environment sooner.
Scratch-resistant design: the surface of our door hook is designed to be scratch-resistant. The smooth end of the hook prevents scratches on your clothes or scarves.
description: Product Description Complete with accessories With mounting attachment and mounting hook attachment. Auxiliary stickers Prevents the hooks from making noise and effectively prevents the door from being scratched. Common door sizes Fits all standard doors from 3.9 cm to 4.5 cm (1.5"" to 1.8"") thick with a frame gap of more than 1.5 mm (the thickness of a coin). Simple contemporary style Glossy black painted smooth edges Decorative and practical
